name: Reaction Diffusion
description: A Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion simulation running entirely on the GPU in a GLSL TOP, with the previous state fed back each frame.

nodes.name: seed1
nodes.comment: Initial perturbation that seeds the B chemical

nodes.name: glsl1
nodes.comment: Gray-Scott update step (reads feedback as input 0)

parameters.name: uniform_count
parameters.description: Declare two scalar (Constant) uniforms on the GLSL TOP so uFeed/uKill resolve.

parameters.name: feed_rate
parameters.label: Feed rate
parameters.description: Gray-Scott feed rate, bound to the uFeed uniform.

parameters.name: feed_uniform_name
parameters.description: Bind Constant 0 to the uFeed uniform.

parameters.name: kill_rate
parameters.label: Kill rate
parameters.description: Gray-Scott kill rate, bound to the uKill uniform.

parameters.name: kill_uniform_name
parameters.description: Bind Constant 1 to the uKill uniform.

preview_description: Evolving coral / fingerprint-like organic patterns growing and dividing across the frame.
